word: H1371 - גִּבֵּחַ - gibbêach - ghib-bay'-akh - Forehead bald

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּבּח

Transliteration: gibbêach

Phonetic: ghib-bay'-akh

BDB Definition:

  1. to be high, bald (in the forehead), having a bald forehead

Origin: from an unused root

TWOT entry: 306a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
